creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
The port graphics/fotoxx cannot be fetched.

=> Attempting to fetch https://kornelix.net/downloads/downloads/fotoxx-22.11.tar.gz
fetch: https://kornelix.net/downloads/downloads/fotoxx-22.11.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/fotoxx-22.11.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/fotoxx-22.11.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.

In fact, Older versions are not fetchable.
So, maybe an upgrade port to the latest version is better. (22.12)
https://kornelix.net/downloads/downloads/fotoxx-22.12.tar.gz
